name: vocabuilder
title: VocaBuilder
description: Translate words between languages and build your vocabulary
author: AngryBeaver

commands.name: translate
commands.title: Translate
commands.description: Translate a word or text to your target language

commands.name: flashcards
commands.title: View Flashcards
commands.subtitle: VocaBuilder
commands.description: Review saved words with spaced repetition

preferences.name: geminiApiKey
preferences.title: Gemini API Key
preferences.description: Get a free key at aistudio.google.com

preferences.name: sourceLanguage
preferences.title: Default Source Language
preferences.description: Used before you pick a language pair from the Translate dropdown

preferences.name: targetLanguage
preferences.title: Default Target Language
preferences.description: Used before you pick a language pair from the Translate dropdown

preferences.name: readClipboardOnOpen
preferences.title: Read Clipboard on Open
preferences.label: Enable
preferences.description: If enabled, prefill a suggestion only when clipboard content is a safe single word

preferences.name: translationModelPreset
preferences.title: Translation Model
preferences.description: Gemini model used for translation. Use the custom model field only if you need an ID not listed here.

preferences.name: translationModel
preferences.title: Custom Translation Model ID
preferences.description: Optional advanced override. Use an unprefixed ID, for example gemini-3.5-flash. Reasoning controls are applied only for recognized models.

preferences.name: reasoningLevel
preferences.title: Reasoning Level
preferences.description: Controls Gemini reasoning for translations. Minimum is fastest: it disables thinking where supported; Pro models use their lowest supported reasoning level.

preferences.name: ttsModelPreset
preferences.title: Text-to-Speech Model
preferences.description: Gemini model used for word pronunciation. Use the custom model field only if you need an ID not listed here.

preferences.name: ttsModel
preferences.title: Custom Text-to-Speech Model ID
preferences.description: Optional advanced override. Use an unprefixed ID, for example gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
scripts.eval: mkdir -p evals/results && promptfoo eval -c evals/promptfooconfig.yaml -o evals/results/promptfoo.json
scripts.eval:smoke: mkdir -p evals/results && promptfoo eval -c evals/promptfooconfig.yaml --filter-sample 10 -o evals/results/promptfoo-smoke.json
